nasb.text: I said to you, ‘You have come to the hill country of the Amorites which the Lord our God is about to give us.

esv.text: And I said to you, ‘You have come to the hill country of the Amorites, which the Lord our God is giving us.

cnv.text: 我對你們說：‘你們已經到了亞摩利人的山地，就是耶和華我們的　神賜給我們的。

ccb.text: 我对你们说，‘我们的上帝耶和华赐给我们的亚摩利山区到了。
